title: Software Architect
description: Learn to design scalable, maintainable, and robust software systems from first principles and guide teams to build them.

courses.title: System Design Interview (Vol 1 & 2)
courses.description: An insider's guide by Alex Xu to understand the building blocks of large scale distributed systems.

courses.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
courses.description: The 'Bible' of modern distributed systems design by Martin Kleppmann.

courses.title: Building Microservices
courses.description: Designing Fine-Grained Systems by Sam Newman. An essential guide to microservice architectures.

courses.title: Domain-Driven Design
courses.description: Tackling Complexity in the Heart of Software by Eric Evans.

details.importance: They ensure systems are scalable, maintainable, and built to survive years of changing requirements without collapsing under technical debt.
details.rolesAndResponsibilities: Designing system topologies, choosing technology stacks, defining communication protocols, and writing core foundational code.
details.aiImpact: Low. AI writes tactical code well, but struggles with large-scale strategic decisions involving trade-offs like eventual consistency vs immediate consistency.
details.marketDemand: Moderate but highly specialized. Every mid-to-large company needs them, but openings are fewer than standard software engineers.

expectations.junior: There is no 'junior' architect. Progresses from Senior Engineer.
expectations.mid: Design microservices, standardize databases, and guide teams on architectural best practices.
expectations.senior: Design multi-region, high-availability platforms handling petabytes of data with zero-downtime tolerance.
